name: Elevated Advisory Group
description: Elevated Advisory Group is a cannabis industry consulting firm specializing in extraction and manufacturing lab design, license application support, retail consulting, cultivation advisory, expert witness services, and operational analysis. Operating nationally and internationally with three managing partners.

name: Elevated Advisory Group — Cannabis Consulting
description: Full-service cannabis industry consulting firm. Services include extraction and manufacturing lab design, license application development, expert witness services, operational audits, retail consulting, cultivation advisory, and analytical lab consulting.

itemOffered.name: Cannabis Extraction & Manufacturing Lab Design
itemOffered.description: End-to-end extraction facility design including C1D1 room specifications, equipment selection, layout planning, and buildout oversight for cannabis processors.

itemOffered.name: Cannabis License Application Services
itemOffered.description: State cannabis license application development, including application writing, supporting documentation, facility plans, and regulatory compliance strategy.

itemOffered.name: Expert Witness Services
itemOffered.description: Cannabis industry expert witness services for litigation, regulatory proceedings, and arbitration involving extraction operations, manufacturing, and compliance.

itemOffered.name: Cannabis Operational Analysis & Auditing
itemOffered.description: Comprehensive operational audits of cannabis facilities covering compliance, efficiency, yield optimization, staffing, and cost reduction opportunities.

itemOffered.name: Cannabis Retail Consulting
itemOffered.description: Cannabis retail store design, product assortment strategy, staff training, POS systems, compliance, and customer experience optimization.

itemOffered.name: Cannabis Cultivation Consulting
itemOffered.description: Cannabis cultivation facility design, environmental control systems, yield optimization, equipment procurement, and operational SOPs.

name: Elevated Advisory Group
description: Cannabis industry consulting — extraction lab design, licensing, expert witness, operational analysis, retail and cultivation advisory.
